creator: timo.schoeler@riscworks.net
text:
hi,

since i upgraded from -RELEASE to -STABLE following entries occur (the
'bad' ones are new -- they didn't show up on -RELEASE; i have three
machines of this type, all show the same problem):

acpi0: <PTLTD   RSDT> on motherboard
acpi: bad write to port 0xcf8 (32), val 0x80000070
acpi: bad read from port 0xcfc (32)
acpi0: Power Button (fixed)
acpi: bad write to port 0xcf8 (32), val 0x80000344
acpi: bad read from port 0xcfc (32)
acpi: bad read from port 0xcfc (32)

full dmesg here:

Fix: 

yes, please.
How-To-Repeat: build -STABLE, install, boot.
